records.text:
Memory kind: audit_log.

Retrieval role: audit-only execution log.

Primary for: audit lookup and evidence reconstruction.

Not primary for: repair planning, policy enforcement, persona memory.

Authority: audit_only.

Collection: misa_audit_memory.

Original source id: bridge-c94091e4c147b96f.

Audit log bridge-c94091e4c147b96f

Read-only audit record for work-order routing and action-policy reconstruction.

Memory kind: decision_trace.

Retrieval role: decision-path trace.

Primary for: explaining why a routing or control decision happened.

Not primary for: repair work order execution, policy enforcement.

Authority: audit_only.

Collection: misa_decision_memory.

Original source id: bridge-c94091e4c147b96f.

Decision trace bridge-c94091e4c147b96f

Action policy result: require_interrupt.

Memory kind: agent_experience_candidate.

Retrieval role: unverified agent experience candidate.

Primary for: reviewing possible reusable agent experience.

Not primary for: authoritative behavior change until promoted.

Authority: candidate.

Collection: misa_experience_memory.

Original source id: misa-distilled-failure-log-provider-timeout-006.

Candidate experience from wo-repair-local-distillation-sources-auto-l3-overpromotion

Agent self-review may use this as candidate experience, but it cannot become durable behavior until promoted.

records.text:
Memory kind: repair_work_order.

Retrieval role: repair work order.

Primary for: repair planning, follow-up work, and bug-fix task retrieval.

Not primary for: policy boundary retrieval.

Authority: candidate.

Collection: misa_work_order_memory.

Original source id: misa-distilled-failure-log-provider-timeout-006.

Auto-L3 non-skill promotion from local distillation sources

Broad Auto-L3 would promote case, memory and policy lessons from local distillation sources into skills. Minimal-positive mode blocked the export, so this is a local design/regression risk, not a live production incident. Keep regression coverage and repair-ticket wording specific enough that future agents know which route owns each lesson.

source_refs.note: Keep this as case, not L3 skill export.
Keep this as policy, not L3 skill export.
Keep this as memory, not L3 skill export.

metadata.title: Auto-L3 non-skill promotion from local distillation sources

retrieval_strategy.primary_rule: Infer or receive the requested memory kind, then search that kind/collection before global semantic search.
retrieval_strategy.same_source_rule: Use original_source_id, source_id, and decision_trace_id to attach sibling context after the primary result is known.
retrieval_strategy.fallback_rule: Only widen to related kinds when no primary-kind candidate clears the minimum score.
hard_rules: kind filter runs before same-source rerank for explicit or high-confidence queries
same-source context cannot outrank a valid primary-kind hit
global fallback is diagnostic, not the default answer path
candidate and audit records remain non-authoritative

warnings: This adapter only prepares Zilliz collection and upsert payloads.
It does not create embeddings and does not write Zilliz.
Retrieval should use kind-filtered primary search before same-source rerank.
Run a reversible synthetic write/delete probe before connecting this payload to a live writer.
Candidate and audit records remain non-authoritative even if they are searchable.
